goal: Define the first Builder adapter contract as a document-only boundary before any deep Builder integration is attempted.
claims: BP-005 defines a Builder adapter boundary without implementing integration code.
The contract lists allowed donor surfaces, required gates, input/output envelopes, evidence, and explicit no-go paths.
The contract preserves BP-001/BP-003 Phase Scanner gating and BP-004 yellow-path product-risk handling.
assumptions: Builder donor availability remains based on docs/BUILDER_DONOR_MAP.md and docs/ADAPTER_CONTRACTS_v0.md.
BP-005 should not edit existing donor docs or scanner tools.
A document-only adapter contract is the correct next step before code integration.
dod: The contract defines allowed operations, blocked operations, required gates, input envelope, output envelope, evidence bundle, and fail behavior.
The contract explicitly forbids Render integration, Builder Chat Fusion, Auto-Merge, Auto-Deploy, AICOS write, Maya write, and unrestricted parallel tracks.
stop_conditions: Existing donor docs or scanner tools need editing
prior_task_findings: BP-004 showed known-risk handling as yellow human review and warned that BP-005 should remain document-only without scanner or runtime code edits.
